mapper.select:
SELECT V.VST_VHCL_RSVT_NO AS vstVhclRsvtNo, V.VST_VHCL_TY_CD AS vstVhclTyCd, V.VST_VHCL_NO AS vstVhclNo, V.VSTR_NM AS vstrNm, V.VST_YMD AS vstYmd, V.STAY_HR AS stayHr, V.VST_STTS_CD AS vstSttsCd, V.REG_DT AS regDt, V.MDF_DT AS mdfDt, V.VST_PRPS_CN AS vstPrpsCn, V.USER_NO AS userNo, V.HO_NO AS hoNo,
M.USER_NM AS userNm, AU.DONG_NM AS dong, AD.HO AS ho
FROM VST_VHCL_RSVT V
LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = V.USER_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = V.HO_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO
WHERE V.HO_NO LIKE #{aptCmplexNo} || '%'
ORDER BY V.REG_DT DESC

SELECT V.VST_VHCL_RSVT_NO AS vstVhclRsvtNo, V.VST_VHCL_TY_CD AS vstVhclTyCd, V.VST_VHCL_NO AS vstVhclNo, V.VSTR_NM AS vstrNm, V.VST_YMD AS vstYmd, V.STAY_HR AS stayHr, V.VST_STTS_CD AS vstSttsCd, V.REG_DT AS regDt, V.MDF_DT AS mdfDt, V.VST_PRPS_CN AS vstPrpsCn, V.USER_NO AS userNo, V.HO_NO AS hoNo,
M.USER_NM AS userNm, AU.DONG_NM AS dong, AD.HO AS ho
FROM VST_VHCL_RSVT V
LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = V.USER_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = V.HO_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO
WHERE V.VST_VHCL_RSVT_NO = #{vstVhclRsvtNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VST_VHCL_RSVT ( VST_VHCL_RSVT_NO, VST_VHCL_TY_CD, VST_VHCL_NO, VSTR_NM, VST_YMD, STAY_HR, VST_STTS_CD, VST_PRPS_CN, USER_NO, HO_NO ) VALUES ( #{vstVhclRsvtNo}, #{vstVhclTyCd}, #{vstVhclNo}, #{vstrNm}, #{vstYmd}, #{stayHr}, #{vstSttsCd}, #{vstPrpsCn}, #{userNo}, #{hoNo} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE VST_VHCL_RSVT SET VST_VHCL_TY_CD = #{vstVhclTyCd}, VST_VHCL_NO = #{vstVhclNo}, VSTR_NM = #{vstrNm}, VST_YMD = #{vstYmd}, STAY_HR = #{stayHr}, VST_STTS_CD = #{vstSttsCd}, VST_PRPS_CN = #{vstPrpsCn}, USER_NO = #{userNo}, HO_NO = #{hoNo}, MDF_DT = SYSDATE
WHERE VST_VHCL_RSVT_NO = #{vstVhclRsvtNo}
